message:
feat(viewer): add routed issue backdrop preservation, scoped issue navigation lists, and Mermaid backdrop context

- Add ISSUE_BACKDROP_VIEWS set and navigateToIssue(id, backdropView)
  function that encodes the source view into the route so returning from
  issue detail restores the correct backdrop (dashboard/insights/graph)
  instead of always falling back to issues view
- Add issueNavListForView() that scopes keyboard issue navigation
  (j/k prev/next) to the issues view only, preventing stale navigation
  state from leaking into other views
- Wire Mermaid diagram click handlers to preserve backdrop context when
  navigating between issues in the dependency graph
- Add tests asserting backdrop view preservation, Mermaid backdrop wiring,
  and issue nav list scoping
- Sync beads issue tracker and history snapshots

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
